sentence: 他是一名经验丰富的程序员。
pinyin: Tā shì yī míng jīngyàn fēngfù de chéngxùyuán.

sentence: 三月份天气开始变暖了。
pinyin: Sān yuèfèn tiānqì kāishǐ biàn nuǎn le.
english: The weather starts to warm up in March.

pinyin: Wǒ biǎodì bǐ wǒ xiǎo sān suì.
english: My younger male cousin is three years younger than me.

sentence: 孩子们在游乐场玩得很开心。
pinyin: Háizimen zài yóulèchǎng wán de hěn kāixīn.
english: The children are having a great time at the playground.

sentence: 她把绳子打结固定在树上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ shéngzi dǎjié gùdìng zài shù shàng.
english: She tied a knot in the rope to secure it to the tree.
